eventScripts.script:
if not initialChange:
		try:
			# Read the step tag to determine which row to update (Step 1 corresponds to Row 0, Step 2 to Row 1, etc.)
			step_value = system.tag.readBlocking(["[.]Step"])[0].value

			# Get the current dataset from the 'Active Recipe' tag
			dataset = system.tag.readBlocking(["[.]../../Charge/Active Recipe"])[0].value

			# Check if the dataset has any rows
			if dataset.rowCount == 0:
				system.util.getLogger("TagChangeScript").warn("No rows in the dataset")
				return

			# Ensure the step value is valid for the dataset (step_value corresponds to row index)
			row_to_update = step_value - 1  # Step 1 corresponds to row 0, Step 2 to row 1, etc.

			if row_to_update < 0 or row_to_update >= dataset.rowCount:
				system.util.getLogger("TagChangeScript").warn("Step value {} is out of bounds for the dataset".format(step_value))
				return

			# Check if currentValue is 0, if so, reset the specified column to 0
			if currentValue.value == 0:
				column_to_update = 10  # Assuming column 10 is the one to reset

				# Update the dataset with 0 in the specified row and column
				updatedDataset = system.dataset.setValue(dataset, row_to_update, column_to_update, 0)

				# Write the updated dataset back to the 'Active Recipe' tag
				system.tag.writeBlocking(["[.]../../Charge/Active Recipe"], [updatedDataset])

				# Log the update
				system.util.getLogger("TagChangeScript").info("currentValue is 0, wrote 0 to row {} in column {}.".format(row_to_update, column_to_update))
				return

			# Convert the selected row to a list and update the 10th column (index 10)
			rowData = list(system.dataset.toPyDataSet(dataset)[row_to_update])  # Convert the row to a list
			rowData[10] = float(currentValue.value)  # Ensuring the value is of type float for column 10

			# Update the dataset with the modified value in the specified row and column
			updatedDataset = system.dataset.setValue(dataset, row_to_update, 10, rowData[10])

			# Write the updated dataset back to the 'Active Recipe' tag
			system.tag.writeBlocking(["[.]../../Charge/Active Recipe"], [updatedDataset])

			# Log successful update
#			system.util.getLogger("TagChangeScript").info("Successfully updated row {} in column 10.".format(row_to_update))

		except Exception as e:
			# Log any errors encountered during the process
			system.util.getLogger("TagChangeScript").error("Error updating dataset: " + str(e))

			# Read the step tag to determine which row to update (Step 1 corresponds to Row 0, Step 2 to Row 1, etc.)
			step_value = system.tag.readBlocking(["[.]Step"])[0].value

			# Get the current dataset from the 'Active Recipe' tag
			dataset = system.tag.readBlocking(["[.]../../Charge/Active Recipe"])[0].value

			# Check if the dataset has any rows
			if dataset.rowCount == 0:
#				system.util.getLogger("TagChangeScript").warn("No rows in the dataset")
				return

			# Ensure the step value is valid for the dataset (step_value corresponds to row index)
			row_to_update = step_value - 1  # Step 1 corresponds to row 0, Step 2 to row 1, etc.

			if row_to_update < 0 or row_to_update >= dataset.rowCount:
#				system.util.getLogger("TagChangeScript").warn("Step value {} is out of bounds for the dataset".format(step_value))
				return

			# Check if step_value is 0; if so, write 0 to the specified column in the first row and exit
			if step_value == 0:
				column_to_update = 22  # Column 22 to reset to 0

				# Update the dataset with 0 in the specified row and column
				updatedDataset = system.dataset.setValue(dataset, 0, column_to_update, 0)

				# Write the updated dataset back to the 'Active Recipe' tag
				system.tag.writeBlocking(["[.]../../Charge/Active Recipe"], [updatedDataset])

				# Log the update
#				system.util.getLogger("TagChangeScript").info("Step is 0, wrote 0 to row 0 in column {}.".format(column_to_update))
				return

			# Convert the selected row to a list and update the 22nd column (index 22)
			rowData = list(system.dataset.toPyDataSet(dataset)[row_to_update])  # Convert the row to a list
			rowData[22] = float(currentValue.value)  # Ensuring the value is of type float for column 22
			

			updatedDataset = system.dataset.setValue(dataset, row_to_update, 22, rowData[22])

				# Write the updated dataset back to the 'Active Recipe' tag
			system.tag.writeBlocking(["[.]../../Charge/Active Recipe"], [updatedDataset])

			# Log successful update
#			system.util.getLogger("TagChangeScript").info("Successfully updated row {} in column 22.".format(row_to_update))

		except Exception as e:
			# Log any errors encountered during the process
			system.util.getLogger("TagChangeScript").error("Error updating dataset: " + str(e))

eventScripts.script:
# Initialize logger
    logger = system.util.getLogger("StepVolumeLogger")

    # Ignore initial changes to avoid executing on first attachment
    if initialChange:
        logger.info("Initial change detected; script will not execute.")
        return

    # Set newValue from currentValue for handling 10 steps
    newValue = currentValue.value
    baseTagPath = '[SCADA]__SITE_LONG__/Cylinders/1'
    postTreatmentBaseTagPath = '[SCADA]__SITE_LONG__/Production/Post Treatment'
    tagSplit = '[SCADA]__SITE_LONG__'
    dbName = '__SITE_SHORT__'
    pNum = '523'
    cylNum = 1

    try:
        # Get current timestamp
        currentTime = system.date.now()
        currentTimeStr = system.date.format(currentTime, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS")
        
        # Read required tags
        cID = system.tag.readBlocking([baseTagPath + '/Charge/ID'])[0].value
        chrgNum = system.tag.readBlocking([baseTagPath + '/Charge/Number'])[0].value
        volumeTagPath = baseTagPath + '/Edge/Control/Work Tank Volume'
        datasetTagPath = baseTagPath + '/Charge/Step Volumes'
        stepTimesTagPath = baseTagPath + '/Charge/Step Times'
        
        volume = system.tag.readBlocking([volumeTagPath])[0].value
        dataset = system.tag.readBlocking([datasetTagPath])[0].value
        stepTimesDataset = system.tag.readBlocking([stepTimesTagPath])[0].value

        # Convert datasets to allow editing
        pyDataset = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(dataset)
        updatedDataset = [[str(value) if value is not None else "" for value in row] for row in pyDataset]
        
        pyStepTimesDataset = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(stepTimesDataset)
        updatedStepTimesDataset = [[str(value) if value is not None else "" for value in row] for row in pyStepTimesDataset]

        # Ensure datasets have 10 rows
        if len(updatedDataset) < 10:
            for i in range(10 - len(updatedDataset)):
                updatedDataset.append(["", ""])
                
        if len(updatedStepTimesDataset) < 10:
            for i in range(10 - len(updatedStepTimesDataset)):
                updatedStepTimesDataset.append(["", ""])

        # Update volumes and step times based on step
        if newValue == 1:
            updatedDataset[0][0] = str(volume) if volume is not None else ""
            updatedStepTimesDataset[0][0] = currentTimeStr
        
        elif newValue == 10:
            # Handle step 10
            logger.info("=" * 80)
            logger.info("STEP 10 DETECTED - STARTING CHARGE COMPLETION")
            logger.info("Charge: %s, Cylinder: %s" % (chrgNum, cylNum))
            logger.info("=" * 80)
            
            # Get tank number for QC processing
            tankNumber = system.tag.readBlocking([baseTagPath + '/Charge/Work Tank'])[0].value
            if tankNumber is None:
                tankNumber = 3  # Default tank
            
            # Write basic info to Post Treatment tags
            system.tag.writeBlocking([
                postTreatmentBaseTagPath + '/Chemical Usage/Charge Number',
                postTreatmentBaseTagPath + '/Chemical Usage/Tank',
                postTreatmentBaseTagPath + '/Chemical Usage/Cylinder',
                postTreatmentBaseTagPath + "/Quality Control/Assay Preservative RAW",
                postTreatmentBaseTagPath + "/Quality Control/Redrill Preservative RAW",
                postTreatmentBaseTagPath + "/Quality Control/Penetration Sampled",
                postTreatmentBaseTagPath + "/Quality Control/Penetration Failed"
            ], [
                int(chrgNum),
                tankNumber,
                cylNum,
                0,
                0,
                0,
                0
            ])
            
            # Update step times for step 10
            if newValue > 1:
                updatedStepTimesDataset[newValue - 2][1] = currentTimeStr
            
            updatedStepTimesDataset[newValue - 1][0] = currentTimeStr
            updatedDataset[9][1] = str(volume) if volume is not None else ""
            
            # Write datasets
            columnNames = ['StartVolume', 'EndVolume']
            stepTimesColumnNames = ['stepStart', 'stepEnd']
            
            system.tag.writeBlocking([datasetTagPath], [system.dataset.toDataSet(columnNames, updatedDataset)])
            system.tag.writeBlocking([stepTimesTagPath], [system.dataset.toDataSet(stepTimesColumnNames, updatedStepTimesDataset)])
            
            updatedStepTimesDataset[9][1] = ""
            system.tag.writeBlocking([stepTimesTagPath], [system.dataset.toDataSet(stepTimesColumnNames, updatedStepTimesDataset)])
            
            # Set charge end time
            endTime = system.date.now()
            path = baseTagPath + "/Charge/End Time"
            system.tag.writeBlocking([path], [endTime])
            
            # Insert charge data to database
            try:
                cylinder.endCharge.insert_charge_data_test(baseTagPath, dbName)
                logger.info("Charge data inserted to database")
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error("Error inserting charge data: " + str(e))
            
            # ERP API calls
            try:
                xmlData = ERP.msrAPI.rebuildXML(pNum, cylNum, cID, 0, 1, dbName, tagSplit)
                ERP.msrAPI.markFinished(pNum, cylNum, chrgNum, xmlData, tagSplit)
                logger.info("ERP marked as finished")
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error("Error with ERP API: " + str(e))
            
            # Update tank volumes
            try:
                tanks.writeTankConfigData.update_tank_volumes(tagSplit, dbName)
                logger.info("Tank volumes updated")
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error("Error updating tank volumes: " + str(e))
            
            # Store active recipe
            try:
                cylinder.activeRecipe.chargeCompletedActiveRecipeInsert(cylNum)
                logger.info("Active recipe stored")
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error("Error writing to PlantDB ActiveRecipe: " + str(e))
            
            # ========================================================================
            # AUTO-SAVE QC CALCULATION
            # ========================================================================
            logger.info("-" * 80)
            logger.info("STARTING AUTO-SAVE QC CALCULATION")
            logger.info("-" * 80)
            
            try:
                # Get solution density
                density = system.tag.readBlocking([baseTagPath + "/Edge/Control/Setpoints/Sol Density"])[0].value
                if not density or density <= 0:
                    density = 8.407569
                    logger.warn("Invalid density from PLC, using default: %s" % density)
                
                # Write density start
                system.tag.writeBlocking([postTreatmentBaseTagPath + '/Chemical Usage/Density Start'], [density])
                
                # Read and parse chemical units from tag
                chemical_units_from_tag = None
                try:
                    units_value = system.tag.readBlocking([baseTagPath + '/Charge/Chemical Units'])[0].value
                    
                    if units_value is not None:
                        import ast
                        if isinstance(units_value, (str, unicode)):
                            chemical_units_from_tag = ast.literal_eval(units_value)
                            logger.info("Parsed chemical units from tag: %s" % chemical_units_from_tag)
                        elif isinstance(units_value, list):
                            chemical_units_from_tag = units_value
                            logger.info("Chemical units already in list format: %s" % chemical_units_from_tag)
                        
                        # Write to Post Treatment tag
                        system.tag.writeBlocking([postTreatmentBaseTagPath + '/Chemical Usage/Chemical Units'], [units_value])
                except Exception as e:
                    logger.warn("Could not read/parse chemical units from tag: %s" % str(e))
                
                # Read preservative type from tag
                preservative_type_from_tag = None
                try:
                    # *** PUT YOUR PRESERVATIVE TYPE TAG PATH HERE ***
                    pres_type_tag_path = baseTagPath + '/Charge/Chemical Name'
                    
                    pres_type = system.tag.readBlocking([pres_type_tag_path])[0].value
                    if pres_type:
                        preservative_type_from_tag = str(pres_type).upper()  # Ensure it's "ECO", "MCA", or "FR"
                        logger.info("Read preservative type from tag: %s" % preservative_type_from_tag)
                except Exception as e:
                    logger.warn("Could not read preservative type from tag: %s" % str(e))
                    logger.info("Will use auto-detection instead")
                
                # Write number of chemicals if available
                try:
                    num_chemicals = system.tag.readBlocking([baseTagPath + '/Charge/Number Of Chemicals'])[0].value
                    if num_chemicals is not None:
                        system.tag.writeBlocking([postTreatmentBaseTagPath + '/Chemical Usage/Number of Chemicals'], [num_chemicals])
                except:
                    pass
                
                logger.info("Calling calculateRetentionAndLbsFromDb with auto_save_qc=True")
                logger.info("  Charge: %s, Tank: %s, Database: %s" % (chrgNum, tankNumber, dbName))
                if chemical_units_from_tag:
                    logger.info("  Chemical Units: %s" % chemical_units_from_tag)
                if preservative_type_from_tag:
                    logger.info("  Preservative Type: %s (from tag)" % preservative_type_from_tag)
                else:
                    logger.info("  Preservative Type: Will auto-detect")
                
                # Call the calculation with auto-save
                results = qualityControl.calcs_test.calculateRetentionAndLbsFromDb(
                    chargeNumber=str(chrgNum),
                    tankNumber=str(tankNumber),
                    dbName=dbName,
                    tagPath=postTreatmentBaseTagPath,
                    solution_density=float(density),
                    writeTags=False,
                    debug=True,
                    chemical_units=chemical_units_from_tag,  # Pass parsed units from tag
                    cu_to_mca_factors=None,
                    override_cu_start_chem2=None,
                    use_dynamic_strip_factors=True,
                    update_database=False,
                    auto_save_qc=True,
                    preservative_type=preservative_type_from_tag  # Pass preservative type from tag
                )
                
                # Check if save was successful
                if results and results.get("qc_save_success"):
                    logger.info("✓ QC data auto-saved successfully!")
                    logger.info("  Calculation Type: %s" % results.get("calculation_type"))
                    logger.info("  Data Source: %s" % results.get("chemical_data_source"))
                    
                    # Log chemical summary
                    if results.get("chemicals"):
                        logger.info("\n=== SAVED CHEMICAL DATA ===")
                        for chem in results.get("chemicals", []):
                            if chem.get("total_mca_pcf", 0) > 0:
                                logger.info("  Chemical %s: PCF=%.6f, Lbs=%.1f, Start=%.2f, Finish=%.2f" % (
                                    chem["step_number"],
                                    chem["total_mca_pcf"],
                                    chem["mca_lbs"],
                                    next((c["cu_start"] for c in results.get("chemicals_metadata", []) 
                                          if c["step_number"] == chem["step_number"]), 0.0),
                                    chem["cu_finish_percent"]
                                ))
                    
                    # Update tank defaults using RESULTS (more efficient than reading tags)
                    try:
                        qualityControl.updateTankDefault.update_tank_defaults_from_results(
                            tankNumber=tankNumber,
                            dbName=dbName,
                            results=results,  # Pass calculation results directly
                            debug=True
                        )
                        logger.info("✓ Tank defaults updated successfully from calculation results")
                    except Exception as e:
                        logger.warn("Could not update tank defaults from results: %s" % str(e))
                        # Fallback: try reading from tags
                        try:
                            logger.info("Attempting fallback: reading from tags...")
                            qualityControl.updateTankDefault.update_tank_defaults_from_results(
                                tankNumber=tankNumber,
                                dbName=dbName,
                                tagPath=postTreatmentBaseTagPath,  # Fallback to tag reads
                                debug=True
                            )
                            logger.info("✓ Tank defaults updated successfully from tags (fallback)")
                        except Exception as e2:
                            logger.error("Could not update tank defaults (both methods failed): %s" % str(e2))
                        
                else:
                    logger.warn("⚠ QC auto-save failed - manual entry may be required")
                    logger.warn("  Check QC_Data table for Charge %s" % chrgNum)
                    
            except Exception as qc_error:
                logger.error("Auto QC calculation failed: %s" % str(qc_error))
                import traceback
                logger.error(traceback.format_exc())
                logger.error("Manual QC entry will be required for Charge %s" % chrgNum)
            
            logger.info("=" * 80)
            logger.info("STEP 10 PROCESSING COMPLETE")
            logger.info("=" * 80)

            # Check if no mix was performed
            try:
                mix.noMix.checkStatusInsertUnmixed(tagSplit, dbName, chrgNum)
                logger.info("No mix status checked")
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error("Error calling noMix logic: " + str(e))
            
            try:
                # Update Volume Start / TAT FIXED
                system.db.runNamedQuery('Charges/UpdateVolumeStartAndTurnAroundTime',{'chargeNumber': chrgNum})
            except:
                logger.error('failed to log volumestart and turnaroundtime to charges table: ' + str(chrgNum))
            
            # Report to remote database
            try:
                reportingDB.SQLFunctions.chargeCompletedEvent(chrgNum)
                logger.info("Reported to remote database")
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error("Error writing to ReportingDB: " + str(e))
            
            # Clear tags after all processing is complete
            try:
                system.tag.writeBlocking([
                    baseTagPath + '/Charge/Number'
                ], [
                    None
                ])
                logger.info("Cleared Charge Number tag")
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error("Error clearing tags: " + str(e))
            
            return  # Exit after step 10

        else:
            # Intermediate steps 2-9
            updatedDataset[newValue - 2][1] = str(volume) if volume is not None else ""
            updatedDataset[newValue - 1][0] = str(volume) if volume is not None else ""
            
            # Update step times
            if newValue > 1:
                updatedStepTimesDataset[newValue - 2][1] = currentTimeStr
            updatedStepTimesDataset[newValue - 1][0] = currentTimeStr

        # Write updated datasets back to tags
        columnNames = ['StartVolume', 'EndVolume']
        stepTimesColumnNames = ['stepStart', 'stepEnd']
        
        system.tag.writeBlocking([datasetTagPath], [system.dataset.toDataSet(columnNames, updatedDataset)])
        system.tag.writeBlocking([stepTimesTagPath], [system.dataset.toDataSet(stepTimesColumnNames, updatedStepTimesDataset)])

    except Exception as e:
        logger.error("Error in valueChanged script: {}".format(e))

if not initialChange:
        try:
            # Read the step tag to determine which row to update (Step 1 corresponds to Row 0, Step 2 to Row 1, etc.)
            step_value = system.tag.readBlocking(["[.]Step"])[0].value

            # Get the current dataset from the 'Active Recipe' tag

            updatedDataset = system.dataset.setValue(dataset, row_to_update, 6, rowData[6])

tags.documentation: This queries the plant DB to find the max board length for the current charge and cylinder based on the custom property CylinderNum.

tags.query:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Material.BoardFt * Material.Pieces), 0) AS TotalBoardFtSum
FROM Charges
INNER JOIN Material ON Material.ChargeID = Charges.ChargeID
WHERE CAST(Charges.ChargeDateTime AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
   AND Charges.Cylinder = {[.]../Charge/Cylinder};

eventScripts.script:
if not initialChange:
        try:
            # Initialize logger
            logger = system.util.getLogger("TagChangeScript")

            # Read the 'Step' tag to determine the current step
            step_value = system.tag.readBlocking(["[.]Step"])[0].value
            logger.info("Current Step Value: {}".format(step_value))

            # Only proceed if the Step value is exactly 1
            if step_value == 5:
                logger.info("Step value is not 1. Exiting script without changes.")
                return

            # Read the current dataset from the 'Active Recipe' tag
            dataset = system.tag.readBlocking(["[.]../../Charge/Active Recipe"])[0].value

            # Check if the dataset has any rows
            if dataset.rowCount == 0:
                logger.warn("No rows in the dataset")
                return

            # Define the column index to update (Column 22)
            column_to_update = 14  # Adjust if needed

            # Update the first row (row index 0) with the current value
            row_to_update = 0
            new_value = float(currentValue.value)

            # Update the dataset with the new value in the specified row and column
            updatedDataset = system.dataset.setValue(dataset, row_to_update, column_to_update, new_value)

            # Write the updated dataset back to the 'Active Recipe' tag
            system.tag.writeBlocking(["[.]../../Charge/Active Recipe"], [updatedDataset])

            # Log successful update
            logger.info("Successfully updated row {} in column {} with value {}.".format(row_to_update, column_to_update, new_value))

        except Exception as e:
            # Log any errors encountered during the process
            logger.error("Error updating dataset: " + str(e))

if not initialChange:

			step_value = system.tag.readBlocking(["[.]Step"])[0].value

			# Get the current dataset from the 'Active Recipe' tag
			dataset = system.tag.readBlocking(["[.]../../Charge/Active Recipe"])[0].value

			# Check if the dataset has any rows
			if dataset.rowCount == 0:
#				system.util.getLogger("TagChangeScript").warn("No rows in the dataset")
				return

			# If step is 0, write a 0 to the specified column and row and exit
			if step_value == 0:
				row_to_update = 0  # Update the first row (row index 0) for Step 0
				column_to_update = 6  # Assuming you want to update column 6

				# Update the dataset with 0 in the specified row and column
				updatedDataset = system.dataset.setValue(dataset, row_to_update, column_to_update, 0)

				# Write the updated dataset back to the 'Active Recipe' tag
				system.tag.writeBlocking(["[.]../../Charge/Active Recipe"], [updatedDataset])

				# Log the update
#				system.util.getLogger("TagChangeScript").info("Step is 0, wrote 0 to row {} in column {}.".format(row_to_update, column_to_update))
				return

			# Ensure the step value is valid for the dataset (step_value corresponds to row index)
			row_to_update = step_value - 1  # Step 1 corresponds to row 0, Step 2 to row 1, etc.

			if row_to_update < 0 or row_to_update >= dataset.rowCount:
#				system.util.getLogger("TagChangeScript").warn("Step value {} is out of bounds for the dataset".format(step_value))
				return

			# Convert the selected row to a list and update the 6th column (index 6)
			rowData = list(system.dataset.toPyDataSet(dataset)[row_to_update])  # Convert the row to a list
			rowData[6] = float(currentValue.value)  # Ensuring the value is of type float for column 6

			# Update the dataset with the modified value in the specified row and column
			updatedDataset = system.dataset.setValue(dataset, row_to_update, 6, rowData[6])

			# Write the updated dataset back to the 'Active Recipe' tag

eventScripts.script:
# Initialize logger
    logger = system.util.getLogger("StepVolumeLogger")

    # Ignore initial changes to avoid executing on first attachment
    if initialChange:
        logger.info("Initial change detected; script will not execute.")
        return

    # Set newValue from currentValue for handling 10 steps
    newValue = currentValue.value
    baseTagPath = '[SCADA]__SITE_LONG__/Cylinders/2'
    postTreatmentBaseTagPath = '[SCADA]__SITE_LONG__/Production/Post Treatment'
    tagSplit = '[SCADA]__SITE_LONG__'
    dbName = '__SITE_SHORT__'
    pNum = '523'
    cylNum = 2

    try:
        # Get current timestamp
        currentTime = system.date.now()
        currentTimeStr = system.date.format(currentTime, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS")
        
        # Read required tags
        cID = system.tag.readBlocking([baseTagPath + '/Charge/ID'])[0].value
        chrgNum = system.tag.readBlocking([baseTagPath + '/Charge/Number'])[0].value
        volumeTagPath = baseTagPath + '/Edge/Control/Work Tank Volume'
        datasetTagPath = baseTagPath + '/Charge/Step Volumes'
        stepTimesTagPath = baseTagPath + '/Charge/Step Times'
        
        volume = system.tag.readBlocking([volumeTagPath])[0].value
        dataset = system.tag.readBlocking([datasetTagPath])[0].value
        stepTimesDataset = system.tag.readBlocking([stepTimesTagPath])[0].value

        # Convert datasets to allow editing
        pyDataset = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(dataset)
        updatedDataset = [[str(value) if value is not None else "" for value in row] for row in pyDataset]
        
        pyStepTimesDataset = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(stepTimesDataset)
        updatedStepTimesDataset = [[str(value) if value is not None else "" for value in row] for row in pyStepTimesDataset]

        # Ensure datasets have 10 rows
        if len(updatedDataset) < 10:
            for i in range(10 - len(updatedDataset)):
                updatedDataset.append(["", ""])
                
        if len(updatedStepTimesDataset) < 10:
            for i in range(10 - len(updatedStepTimesDataset)):
                updatedStepTimesDataset.append(["", ""])

        # Update volumes and step times based on step
        if newValue == 1:
            updatedDataset[0][0] = str(volume) if volume is not None else ""
            updatedStepTimesDataset[0][0] = currentTimeStr
        
        elif newValue == 10:
            # Handle step 10
            logger.info("=" * 80)
            logger.info("STEP 10 DETECTED - STARTING CHARGE COMPLETION")
            logger.info("Charge: %s, Cylinder: %s" % (chrgNum, cylNum))
            logger.info("=" * 80)
            
            # Get tank number for QC processing
            tankNumber = system.tag.readBlocking([baseTagPath + '/Charge/Work Tank'])[0].value
            if tankNumber is None:
                tankNumber = 3  # Default tank
            
            # Write basic info to Post Treatment tags
            system.tag.writeBlocking([
                postTreatmentBaseTagPath + '/Chemical Usage/Charge Number',
                postTreatmentBaseTagPath + '/Chemical Usage/Tank',
                postTreatmentBaseTagPath + '/Chemical Usage/Cylinder',
                postTreatmentBaseTagPath + "/Quality Control/Assay Preservative RAW",
                postTreatmentBaseTagPath + "/Quality Control/Redrill Preservative RAW",
                postTreatmentBaseTagPath + "/Quality Control/Penetration Sampled",
                postTreatmentBaseTagPath + "/Quality Control/Penetration Failed"
            ], [
                int(chrgNum),
                tankNumber,
                cylNum,
                0,
                0,
                0,
                0
            ])
            
            # Update step times for step 10
            if newValue > 1:
                updatedStepTimesDataset[newValue - 2][1] = currentTimeStr
            
            updatedStepTimesDataset[newValue - 1][0] = currentTimeStr
            updatedDataset[9][1] = str(volume) if volume is not None else ""
            
            # Write datasets
            columnNames = ['StartVolume', 'EndVolume']
            stepTimesColumnNames = ['stepStart', 'stepEnd']
            
            system.tag.writeBlocking([datasetTagPath], [system.dataset.toDataSet(columnNames, updatedDataset)])
            system.tag.writeBlocking([stepTimesTagPath], [system.dataset.toDataSet(stepTimesColumnNames, updatedStepTimesDataset)])
            
            updatedStepTimesDataset[9][1] = ""
            system.tag.writeBlocking([stepTimesTagPath], [system.dataset.toDataSet(stepTimesColumnNames, updatedStepTimesDataset)])
            
            # Set charge end time
            endTime = system.date.now()
            path = baseTagPath + "/Charge/End Time"
            system.tag.writeBlocking([path], [endTime])
            
            # Insert charge data to database
            try:
                cylinder.endCharge.insert_charge_data_test(baseTagPath, dbName)
                logger.info("Charge data inserted to database")
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error("Error inserting charge data: " + str(e))
            
            # ERP API calls
            try:
                xmlData = ERP.msrAPI.rebuildXML(pNum, cylNum, cID, 0, 1, dbName, tagSplit)
                ERP.msrAPI.markFinished(pNum, cylNum, chrgNum, xmlData, tagSplit)
                logger.info("ERP marked as finished")
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error("Error with ERP API: " + str(e))
            
            # Update tank volumes
            try:
                tanks.writeTankConfigData.update_tank_volumes(tagSplit, dbName)
                logger.info("Tank volumes updated")
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error("Error updating tank volumes: " + str(e))
            
            # Store active recipe
            try:
                cylinder.activeRecipe.chargeCompletedActiveRecipeInsert(cylNum)
                logger.info("Active recipe stored")
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error("Error writing to PlantDB ActiveRecipe: " + str(e))
            
            # ========================================================================
            # AUTO-SAVE QC CALCULATION
            # ========================================================================
            logger.info("-" * 80)
            logger.info("STARTING AUTO-SAVE QC CALCULATION")
            logger.info("-" * 80)
            
            try:
                # Get solution density
                density = system.tag.readBlocking([baseTagPath + "/Edge/Control/Setpoints/Sol Density"])[0].value
                if not density or density <= 0:
                    density = 8.407569
                    logger.warn("Invalid density from PLC, using default: %s" % density)
                
                # Write density start
                system.tag.writeBlocking([postTreatmentBaseTagPath + '/Chemical Usage/Density Start'], [density])
                
                # Read and parse chemical units from tag
                chemical_units_from_tag = None
                try:
                    units_value = system.tag.readBlocking([baseTagPath + '/Charge/Chemical Units'])[0].value
                    
                    if units_value is not None:
                        import ast
                        if isinstance(units_value, (str, unicode)):
                            chemical_units_from_tag = ast.literal_eval(units_value)
                            logger.info("Parsed chemical units from tag: %s" % chemical_units_from_tag)
                        elif isinstance(units_value, list):
                            chemical_units_from_tag = units_value
                            logger.info("Chemical units already in list format: %s" % chemical_units_from_tag)
                        
                        # Write to Post Treatment tag
                        system.tag.writeBlocking([postTreatmentBaseTagPath + '/Chemical Usage/Chemical Units'], [units_value])
                except Exception as e:
                    logger.warn("Could not read/parse chemical units from tag: %s" % str(e))
                
                # Read preservative type from tag
                preservative_type_from_tag = None
                try:
                    # *** PUT YOUR PRESERVATIVE TYPE TAG PATH HERE ***
                    pres_type_tag_path = baseTagPath + '/Charge/Chemical Name'
                    
                    pres_type = system.tag.readBlocking([pres_type_tag_path])[0].value
                    if pres_type:
                        preservative_type_from_tag = str(pres_type).upper()  # Ensure it's "ECO", "MCA", or "FR"
                        logger.info("Read preservative type from tag: %s" % preservative_type_from_tag)
                except Exception as e:
                    logger.warn("Could not read preservative type from tag: %s" % str(e))
                    logger.info("Will use auto-detection instead")
                
                # Write number of chemicals if available
                try:
                    num_chemicals = system.tag.readBlocking([baseTagPath + '/Charge/Number Of Chemicals'])[0].value
                    if num_chemicals is not None:
                        system.tag.writeBlocking([postTreatmentBaseTagPath + '/Chemical Usage/Number of Chemicals'], [num_chemicals])
                except:
                    pass
                
                logger.info("Calling calculateRetentionAndLbsFromDb with auto_save_qc=True")
                logger.info("  Charge: %s, Tank: %s, Database: %s" % (chrgNum, tankNumber, dbName))
                if chemical_units_from_tag:
                    logger.info("  Chemical Units: %s" % chemical_units_from_tag)
                if preservative_type_from_tag:
                    logger.info("  Preservative Type: %s (from tag)" % preservative_type_from_tag)
                else:
                    logger.info("  Preservative Type: Will auto-detect")
                
                # Call the calculation with auto-save
                results = qualityControl.calcs_test.calculateRetentionAndLbsFromDb(
                    chargeNumber=str(chrgNum),
                    tankNumber=str(tankNumber),
                    dbName=dbName,
                    tagPath=postTreatmentBaseTagPath,
                    solution_density=float(density),
                    writeTags=False,
                    debug=True,
                    chemical_units=chemical_units_from_tag,  # Pass parsed units from tag
                    cu_to_mca_factors=None,
                    override_cu_start_chem2=None,
                    use_dynamic_strip_factors=True,
                    update_database=False,
                    auto_save_qc=True,
                    preservative_type=preservative_type_from_tag  # Pass preservative type from tag
                )
                
                # Check if save was successful
                if results and results.get("qc_save_success"):
                    logger.info("✓ QC data auto-saved successfully!")
                    logger.info("  Calculation Type: %s" % results.get("calculation_type"))
                    logger.info("  Data Source: %s" % results.get("chemical_data_source"))
                    
                    # Log chemical summary
                    if results.get("chemicals"):
                        logger.info("\n=== SAVED CHEMICAL DATA ===")
                        for chem in results.get("chemicals", []):
                            if chem.get("total_mca_pcf", 0) > 0:
                                logger.info("  Chemical %s: PCF=%.6f, Lbs=%.1f, Start=%.2f, Finish=%.2f" % (
                                    chem["step_number"],
                                    chem["total_mca_pcf"],
                                    chem["mca_lbs"],
                                    next((c["cu_start"] for c in results.get("chemicals_metadata", []) 
                                          if c["step_number"] == chem["step_number"]), 0.0),
                                    chem["cu_finish_percent"]
                                ))
                    
                    # Update tank defaults using RESULTS (more efficient than reading tags)
                    try:
                        qualityControl.updateTankDefault.update_tank_defaults_from_results(
                            tankNumber=tankNumber,
                            dbName=dbName,
                            results=results,  # Pass calculation results directly
                            debug=True
                        )
                        logger.info("✓ Tank defaults updated successfully from calculation results")
                    except Exception as e:
                        logger.warn("Could not update tank defaults from results: %s" % str(e))
                        # Fallback: try reading from tags
                        try:
                            logger.info("Attempting fallback: reading from tags...")
                            qualityControl.updateTankDefault.update_tank_defaults_from_results(
                                tankNumber=tankNumber,
                                dbName=dbName,
                                tagPath=postTreatmentBaseTagPath,  # Fallback to tag reads
                                debug=True
                            )
                            logger.info("✓ Tank defaults updated successfully from tags (fallback)")
                        except Exception as e2:
                            logger.error("Could not update tank defaults (both methods failed): %s" % str(e2))
                        
                else:
                    logger.warn("⚠ QC auto-save failed - manual entry may be required")
                    logger.warn("  Check QC_Data table for Charge %s" % chrgNum)
                    
            except Exception as qc_error:
                logger.error("Auto QC calculation failed: %s" % str(qc_error))
                import traceback
                logger.error(traceback.format_exc())
                logger.error("Manual QC entry will be required for Charge %s" % chrgNum)
            
            logger.info("=" * 80)
            logger.info("STEP 10 PROCESSING COMPLETE")
            logger.info("=" * 80)

            # Check if no mix was performed
            try:
                mix.noMix.checkStatusInsertUnmixed(tagSplit, dbName, chrgNum)
                logger.info("No mix status checked")
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error("Error calling noMix logic: " + str(e))
            
            try:
                # Update Volume Start / TAT FIXED
                system.db.runNamedQuery('Charges/UpdateVolumeStartAndTurnAroundTime',{'chargeNumber': chrgNum})
            except:
                logger.error('failed to log volumestart and turnaroundtime to charges table: ' + str(chrgNum))
            
            # Report to remote database
            try:
                reportingDB.SQLFunctions.chargeCompletedEvent(chrgNum)
                logger.info("Reported to remote database")
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error("Error writing to ReportingDB: " + str(e))
            
            # Clear tags after all processing is complete
            try:
                system.tag.writeBlocking([
                    baseTagPath + '/Charge/Number'
                ], [
                    None
                ])
                logger.info("Cleared Charge Number tag")
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error("Error clearing tags: " + str(e))
            
            return  # Exit after step 10

        else:
            # Intermediate steps 2-9
            updatedDataset[newValue - 2][1] = str(volume) if volume is not None else ""
            updatedDataset[newValue - 1][0] = str(volume) if volume is not None else ""
            
            # Update step times
            if newValue > 1:
                updatedStepTimesDataset[newValue - 2][1] = currentTimeStr
            updatedStepTimesDataset[newValue - 1][0] = currentTimeStr

        # Write updated datasets back to tags
        columnNames = ['StartVolume', 'EndVolume']
        stepTimesColumnNames = ['stepStart', 'stepEnd']
        
        system.tag.writeBlocking([datasetTagPath], [system.dataset.toDataSet(columnNames, updatedDataset)])
        system.tag.writeBlocking([stepTimesTagPath], [system.dataset.toDataSet(stepTimesColumnNames, updatedStepTimesDataset)])

    except Exception as e:
        logger.error("Error in valueChanged script: {}".format(e))

eventScripts.script:
if not initialChange and currentValue.value == 1:
        debug = 1
        
        # Batch read previous step and stopped step
        tagPaths = [
            "[.]../Edge/Control/Step",          # For prevStep and stoppedOnStep
            "[.]Work Tank",  # For tankNum
            "[.]../../../Plant Info/Plant Number"   # For plantNum
        ]
        tagValues = system.tag.readBlocking(tagPaths)
        
        prevStep = tagValues[0].value
        stoppedOnStep = tagValues[0].value
        tankNum = tagValues[1].value
        plantNum = tagValues[2].value
        
        # Log Step Data
        if debug: print("Assigning Step Reason & Step Complete in Stop Script")
        
        writePaths = [
            "[.]Step Reason",
            "[.]Completed" 
        ]
        writeValues = [10, 1]
        system.tag.writeBlocking(writePaths, writeValues)

        # Log Chem Data to TankToChem if past Final Vacuum
        if prevStep >= 7:
            # Grab Chem Data
            chemList = system.tag.readBlocking(["[.]Treat Start List"])[0].value

            # Iterate through 8 rows of Chem Data
            for i in range(8):
                if debug: print("for loop index: ", i)
                if (chemList.getValueAt(i, 0) != 0) and (chemList.getValueAt(i, 0) != 1):
                    chemNum = chemList.getValueAt(i, 0)
                    if debug: print("Chem Num: ", chemNum)
                    
                    solActual = 0  # Default value

                    # Grab appropriate solActual value based on chemNum
                    if chemNum == 5:  # MCA
                        solActual = system.tag.readBlocking(["[.]Adjusted Sol Percent Math/Finish Lbs Sol"])[0].value
                    
                    elif chemNum == 9:  # Mold AC
                        chemValues = system.tag.readBlocking([
                            "[.]Chemical Dataset[1,2]",
                            "[.]Chemical Dataset[1,3]"
                        ])
                        solActual = chemValues[0].value - chemValues[1].value
                    
                    elif chemNum == 16:  # NaNi
                        chemValues = system.tag.readBlocking([
                            "[.]Chemical Dataset[3,2]",
                            "[.]Chemical Dataset[3,3]"
                        ])
                        solActual = chemValues[0].value - chemValues[1].value
                    
                    elif chemNum == 24:  # CWM
                        chemValues = system.tag.readBlocking([
                            "[.]Chemical Dataset[2,2]",
                            "[.]Chemical Dataset[2,3]"
                        ])
                        solActual = chemValues[0].value - chemValues[1].value
                    
                    elif chemNum == 12:  # Wax
                        chemValues = system.tag.readBlocking([
                            "[.]Chemical Dataset[5,1]",
                            "[.]Chemical Dataset[4,3]"
                        ])
                        solActual = chemValues[0].value - chemValues[1].value
                    
                    if debug: 
                        print("*** Stopping Chem Sol Percent Values ***")
                        print("Stopping Chem Num: ", chemNum)
                        print("Stopping SolActual: ", solActual)
                    
                    # Update TankToChem table
                    system.db.runUpdateQuery(
                        "UPDATE [TankToChem] SET [SolPerActual] = {0} WHERE [PlantNumber] = {1} AND [TankNumber] = {2} AND [ChemNumber] = {3}".format(solActual, plantNum, tankNum, chemNum)
                    )
